challenged_findings.finding: R004233 (¥9,990) would be misjudged under old 2022 policy as missing 部门总经理 approval
challenged_findings.challenge: Is the new policy AR-02 approval truly sufficient? Does财务复核 need to be explicitly visible?
challenged_findings.resolution: R004233 status=approved, tier=AR-02, approver=部门经理(E0008). AR-02 definition is '部门经理,并经财务复核' — the tier assignment and approved status confirm the system applied correct policy. No财务复核 sign-off needed as separate approval row; AR-02 encodes the dual requirement within the tier.

challenged_findings.challenge: Could there be records just outside the boundary that should be checked?
challenged_findings.resolution: Data analyst widened search to [29000, 51000] — still zero records. Boundary is clean.

supporting_evidence: R004233 detail shows tier AR-02, approver_role=部门经理, status=approved
2025 policy AR-02 covers [3000, 10000), R004233 at 9990 is within range
2022 policy ≥8000 threshold is below 9990, so old policy would trigger
exceptions_or_boundaries: ¥9,990 is ¥10 shy of the AR-02/AR-03 boundary at ¥10,000 — close enough to illustrate version trap without crossing
Employee E0012 (杨丽华) is X1 level / 分管副总 — the expense submitter is a VP, not the approver; the approver is 部门经理 E0008 of D008
rationale: No-anomaly conclusion confirmed. R004233 is correctly approved under current 2025 policy. The version trap explanation is valid: an auditor using the deprecated 2022 policy would demand 部门总经理 approval for this ¥9,990 expense, incorrectly flagging it as noncompliant. The second trap interval [30000, 50000) has zero records, so no additional examples exist.
